content:
### Digital Marketing and E-commerce Professional:
1. SEO (Search Engine Optimization)
2. SEM (Search Engine Marketing)
3. PPC (Pay-Per-Click) Advertising
4. Content Marketing
5. Social Media Marketing
6. Email Marketing
7. Mobile Marketing

10. Graphic Design
11. Copywriting
12. E-commerce Platforms (Shopify, Magento)
13. CRM Software
14. Marketing Automation
15. Branding
16. Conversion Rate Optimization
17. Video Marketing
18. Influencer Marketing
19. Online Reputation Management
20. Affiliate Marketing

### College Instructor:
1. Subject Matter Expertise
2. Curriculum Development
3. Lesson Planning
4. Classroom Management
5. Assessment Design
6. Grading
7. Educational Technology
8. Online Learning Platforms
9. Pedagogical Research
10. Communication Skills
